_comment: Mixed-operation example: Step 1 reads a routing requirement from MarkLogic via TDE, Step 2 writes the routing output back as a document.

steps.statement: SELECT routingCode FROM Paris.BeltRoutingRequirements WHERE plant = {Product.plant}
steps._comment: SELECT step — loads routing requirement into working memory.
WRITE step — upserts each routingOutput entity from the Product WM entity as a MarkLogic document. URI placeholder {matNr} resolves from the routingOutput entity attribute.
